response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff-level engineer with a strong background in TypeScript and system architecture, he falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience building AI solutions. His exposure to GenAI, MCP, and agentic workflows appears limited to his most recent role, and he lacks essential core technologies like Python, Vector Databases, and RAG architectures necessary for this position.
strengths: Extensive Staff-level software engineering experience with strong architectural and full-stack capabilities (TypeScript, Node.js).
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows.
Proven technical leadership, mentoring skills, and community engagement through founding platforms, leading workshops, and organizing coding dojos.
concerns: Falls drastically short of the required 8+ years of experience building and shipping production-grade AI solutions.
No demonstrated proficiency in Python, Vector Databases, or Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures.
Lacks evidence of building LLM evaluation pipelines, observability frameworks, or complex unstructured data pipelines.
